rationale: The main alert (A0) shows PowerShell executing an encoded command. The decoded command (DER-001) reveals a multi-stage payload that attempts to compile a DLL (EV-010, EV-011, EV-012, EV-013) and then execute it. This behavior, originating from a winrshost.exe parent (EV-001), is highly indicative of a malicious remote code execution attempt.
